chunks.title: 720p

chunks.title: 720p

chunks.title: 720p

chunks.text: What you have to do is

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: You have to make this ball here in a way

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: That it bounces like a real ball

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: This is a physics simulation

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And some of you will find it difficult

chunks.title: 720p

chunks.title: 720p

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Do you want to do it with transition

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Or do you want to do it with animation

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: But I want to give you a hint

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: If you find it difficult

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: The first hint that I want to give you is

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: That you have to make a different animation in X

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Make a different animation in Y

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: At least I will solve it like this

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Make two different animations

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: If you want to bounce any ball

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Then its trajectory in Y axis

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: It is something like this

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: That its speed decreases

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: So think about such an animation

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: That its speed decreases

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: First make an animation of Y

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Then make an animation of X

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And how will the animation of X be?

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: It will be linear

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Because your speed in X does not decrease

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And if you are not able to understand

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: How to do it

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Then you try it

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: From here to here

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And what you have to do in Y axis

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: From here to here

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And from here to here

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Such that

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: When it is coming from here to here

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: Then its speed is decreasing to zero

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And you have to repeat that animation backwards

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: How to do that?

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: I told you in the animation video

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And you have to stick both the animations together

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: That's it

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: One linear animation

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: And one constant animation

chunks.title: 720p
chunks.text: You have to decide

chunks.title: 720p

chunks.text: Sorry
